prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江大学在天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约1299名、377名、2023年、638名、612名。2022年位次异常靠前（377名），可能与当年选科要求调整或招生计划结构变化有关；近两年（2024–2025）位次稳定在610–640名区间，2025年基准位次约612名，整体呈平稳态势；浙江大学在天津市综合类招生计划：2021年25人、2022年25人、2024年27人、2025年30人；2026年计划27人，较2025年减少3人（缩招10%）。缩招意味着竞争名额减少，对位次有上移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居全国第3名（2021–2026年均为第3名），属于国内顶尖高校阵营，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期内浙江大学声誉评价为偏负面，涉及学术不端、师德师风及校园安全事件，但作为全国顶尖名校，此类舆情对报考热度影响有限；抖音学校热度总排名第14位（高热），短视频曝光量大，反映考生关注度持续较高；浙江大学在第五轮学科评估中拥有A-及以上学科37个，其中A+学科16个（计算机科学与技术、软件工程、控制科学与工程、光学工程、土木工程等），学科实力全国顶尖，对优质生源有强大吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 天津市2026年高考报名总人数约82000人，较2025年71938人增长约14%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；省控线（本科批）2021–2025年从463分升至476分，逐年小幅上升，但浙大录取位次远高于本科线，省控线变化对浙大录取位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次612名、2026年招生计划缩招10%（推高位次）、天津市考生规模增长约14%（加剧竞争）以及浙大顶尖学科吸引力（稳定生源）等多重因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅上移。预测最低位次约600名，区间532–668名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（竺可桢学院图灵班）（计算机科学与技术）
- 工科试验班（竺可桢学院混合班）
- 机器人工程（荣誉项目班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（信息）（计算机科学与技术、信息安全、软件工程等）
- 工科试验班（EE类）（电气工程及其自动化、电子信息工程等）
- 理科试验班类（数学与应用数学、统计学等）
- 社会科学试验班（竺可桢学院人文社科实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 社会科学试验班（经济学、财政学、金融学等）
- 工科试验班（材料、化工与高分子）
- 工科试验班（先进新材料卓越班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在600名左右，区间532–668名。建议位次在区间下限（532名）以内的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（图灵班、混合班）；位次在600名附近的考生以二档专业为主、一档为辅；位次在区间上限（668名）附近的考生以三档保底为主，争取二档。浙江大学学科实力极强，各档专业均有A类学科支撑，建议结合个人兴趣和职业规划选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang University in Tianjin's comprehensive category were approximately 1299, 377, 2023, 638, and 612 respectively. The ranking in 2022 was unusually high (377), possibly due to adjustments in subject selection requirements or changes in enrollment plan structure. In the past two years (2024–2025), rankings stabilized in the 610–640 range, with a baseline ranking of about 612 in 2025, showing an overall stable trend. Zhejiang University's enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Tianjin: 25 in 2021, 25 in 2022, 27 in 2024, 30 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 27, a decrease of 3 (10% reduction) compared to 2025. The reduction means fewer competitive slots, exerting upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 3rd nationally in the Soft Science University Rankings for many years (3rd from 2021 to 2026), placing it among the top-tier universities in China, with strong appeal to high-scoring students. During the 2026 college entrance exam cycle, Zhejiang University's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety incidents. However, as a nationally renowned top university, such public opinion has limited impact on application enthusiasm. The university ranks 14th in overall Douyin popularity (high heat), with significant short video exposure, reflecting sustained high attention from candidates. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Zhejiang University has 37 disciplines rated A- or above, including 16 A+ disciplines (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Optical Engineering, Civil Engineering, etc.), with top-tier disciplinary strength that strongly attracts high-quality students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The total number of candidates registered for the 2026 college entrance exam in Tianjin is approximately 82,000, an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) rose from 463 to 476 points from 2021 to 2025, increasing slightly year by year. However, Zhejiang University's admission ranking is far above the undergraduate line, so changes in the provincial control line have limited impact on its admission ranking.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 612, the 10% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (pushing rankings upward), the approximately 14% increase in Tianjin's candidate population (intensifying competition), and Zhejiang University's strong disciplinary appeal (stabilizing student sources), the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to rise slightly compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 600, with a range of 532–668.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Turing Class) (Computer Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Mixed Class)
- Robotics Engineering (Honors Program Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information) (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Software Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (EE Category) (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information Engineering, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics, etc.)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Economics, Public Finance, Finance, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Materials, Chemical Engineering and Polymers)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced New Materials Excellence Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 600, with a range of 532–668. Candidates with rankings below the lower bound (532) are advised to focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Turing Class, Mixed Class). Candidates with rankings near 600 should prioritize Tier 2 majors, supplemented by Tier 1. Candidates with rankings near the upper bound (668) should mainly use Tier 3 as a safety net, while striving for Tier 2. Zhejiang University has extremely strong disciplinary strength, with A-level disciplines supporting all tiers of majors. It is recommended to choose based on personal interests and career plans.
